home.hero.title: Integrated Procurement Platform
home.hero.subtitle: An innovative and reliable eProcurement solution designed to help enhance efficiency at every stage of your procurement process.
about.title: What is iProc?
about.firstParagraph: iProc is an Indonesian-made eProcurement platform designed to help companies comprehensively manage various aspects of procurement, including demand planning, contract management, inventory management, asset monitoring and management. It utilizes technology to enhance operational efficiency, reduce costs, and ensure transparency and compliance with company policies.
about.secondParagraph: The combination of iProc and Pengadaan.com will maximize the digital potential of procurement and accelerate the company’s digital transformation.
count.title: Effortless solutions, impactful outcomes
features.title: Value-Added Solutions from iProc
features.n1.title: Cost and Time Savings
features.n1.desc: With various features integrated into one platform, iProc can accelerate the procurement workflow and help companies make strategic decisions based on accurate data to identify better cost-saving opportunities.
features.n2.title: The Core Infrastructure for Procurement 4.0
features.n2.desc: iProc supports your journey towards Procurement 4.0, where every strategic and operational decision is made based on in-depth data analysis, creating efficiency, effectiveness, and sustainable competitive advantage.
features.n3.title: Real-Time Visibility
features.n3.desc: iProc allows you to track and monitor every step of your procurement workflow in real-time, enabling you to identify spending trends, evaluate supplier effectiveness, and make strategic adjustments as needed.
features.n4.title: Centralized Data and Documentation
features.n4.desc: Our platform serves as a centralized hub that stores all procurement-related data and documents. You can easily retrieve and access important information, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and more efficient audit processes.
features.n5.title: Strategic Procurement
features.n5.desc: With iProc, the procurement function is no longer just an administrative task, but an essential part of the business strategy to drive growth and innovation.
features.n6.title: Applying GRC (Governance, Risk, and Compliance Principles)
features.n6.desc: iProc helps ensure compliance with rules and regulations, risk management, and the maintenance of good governance in the procurement process.
technology.title: Our Key Capabilities
technology.n1.tabDesc: Grouping, data collection, and commodity analysis enable more informed and strategic decision-making, supporting procurement optimization and cost savings.
technology.n2.tabDesc: Manage the entire vendor management cycle, from onboarding to performance tracking—all within one platform.
technology.n3.tabDesc: This feature facilitates efficient operational/tactical procurement through access to Private Catalogues and Public Catalogues, providing ease in acquiring the goods and services needed.
technology.n4.tabDesc: iProc simplifies strategic procurement management processes, from procurement strategy planning and preparation to execution, ensuring best-value sourcing is achieved.
technology.n5.tabDesc: The entire contract management process—from drafting, execution, monitoring, evaluation, to closure—can be managed efficiently with this feature. Additionally, e-Sign and e-Stamp features make contract management even more practical.
technology.n6.tabDesc: This feature allows companies to monitor invoice and payment status in real-time with an integrated three-way matching system.
technology.n7.tabDesc: Access the data you need with comprehensive reporting and analytics
procurement.title: iProc Leading the Way into with Intelligent Automation.
products.n1.l1: Cloud-based eProcurement implementation that supports the evolving and growing needs of the organization without requiring additional infrastructureinvestment.
products.n2.l1: Simplifies the approval process for Purchase Requisitions (PR), goods, vendors, and Requests for Quotation (RFQ) directly from your smartphone.
products.n2.l2: Supports the Purchase-to-Pay (P2P) process through eCatalogues in a practical and flexible way.
products.n2.l3: Features a user-friendly interface to streamline the procurement process.
customer.title: Proven Track Record
customer.subtitle: Hear it From Our Clients
sector.title: Industries We Serve
sector.subtitle: We provide innovative and customized solutions to meet the unique challenges of various industries.
client.title: Our Clients
award.title: Award
award.subtitle: iProc is a procurement platform that streamlines sourcing, vendor management, and procurement for greater efficiency and transparency.
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about iProc and digital procurement transformation.

cloud.problem.n5: Existing systems are complex, have limited access, and lack flexibility for teams?
cloud.problem.title.n2: Want to switch to an e-Procurement system, but...

cloud.problem.n8: Limited budget, not yet able to adopt a large-scale system?

cloud.features.title: Complete Features to Support Modern Procurement
cloud.features.item1.title: Vendor Registration & Onboarding
cloud.features.item1.desc: Simplifies the new vendor registration process through an automated system
cloud.features.item2.title: Publication of Auction/Tender Announcements
cloud.features.item2.desc: Enabling auction announcements to be accessible by a wider range of vendors
cloud.features.item3.title: Market Survey/RFI
cloud.features.item3.desc: Facilitates the collection of information from potential vendors to support better decision-making.
cloud.features.item4.title: e-Bidding
cloud.features.item4.desc: The electronic procurement process starts from the procurement request, invitation to vendors, evaluation, to the appointment of the winner.

cloud.secNCom.title: Security & Compliance
cloud.secNCom.subtitle: iProc Cloud complies with applicable certifications, standards, and regulations in Indonesia, and is recognized by international security standard bodies.
cloud.secNCom.item1.desc: Information security and management practices aligned with internationally recognized standards.
cloud.secNCom.item2.desc: Officially registered with the Ministry of Communication and Digital Affairs as an Electronic System Provider (PSE).
cloud.secNCom.item3.title: Infrastructure
cloud.secNCom.item3.desc: ADW Cloud operates on infrastructure with a minimum Tier-3 standard in Indonesia.
cloud.secNCom.item4.title: Reliability
cloud.secNCom.item4.desc2: All maintenance activities are managed directly by ADW
cloud.secNCom.item4.desc3: Customer support is available via the Help Center and ticketing system during business hours (Monday–Friday, 08:00–17:00)
cloud.secNCom.item5.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
cloud.secNCom.item5.desc: Provides secure and accurate user identity verification.
cloud.secNCom.item6.title: Data Protected with Cryptography
cloud.secNCom.item6.desc: All data is stored using strong cryptographic technologies to prevent unauthorized access and data breaches.
cloud.secNCom.item7.title: Partnerships for Best-in-Class Security
cloud.secNCom.item7.desc: iProc Cloud collaborates with security partners and cloud providers to ensure continuous protection.
cloud.secNCom.item8.title: Continuously Enhanced Security Standards
cloud.secNCom.item8.desc: The iProc Cloud security team continuously improves data security standards based on accurate analysis and monitoring.
cloud.secNCom.item9.title: Data Backup & Recovery
cloud.secNCom.item9.desc: iProc Cloud ensures data backups are available in the event of data loss or corruption.
cloud.secNCom.item10.title: Data Isolation & Confidentiality
cloud.secNCom.item10.desc: Your data is fully isolated and never shares storage space with other customers’ data.
cloud.secNCom.item11.title: Privacy Notice
cloud.secNCom.item11.desc: We highly respect your data privacy and only access and process data that is strictly necessary.
cloud.form.submit: Continue & Submit Discussion with iProc Team
